data.title: Kraken Launches Commission-Free Trading for U.S. Stocks
data.description:
Kraken offers commission-free trading for over 11,000 U. S. stocks and ETFs, starting in select states.
source: https://coincu.com/332175-kraken-no-commission-trading-us

data.title: SEC delays crypto ETF staking and in-kind redemption decisions as agency mulls long-term crypto regulatory strategy
data.description:
The regulator aims to make a decision regarding rule changes to allow these funds in the coming weeks, according to documents on Monday.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350772/sec-delays-crypto-etf-staking-in-kind-redemption?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Trade wars could spur governments to embrace Web3 — Truebit
data.description:
Escalating trade wars are rattling cryptocurrency markets — but they are also creating new use cases for blockchain networks, Truebit executives told Cointelegraph.  On April 2, President Donald Trump announced plans to charge sweeping tariffs on US imports, prompting other nations to threaten retaliatory measures. Trump later paused the tariff rollout for certain countries — but the possibility of a global trade war still looms, especially after Trump reiterated his commitment to taxing Chinese goods. If high tariffs materialize, blockchain technology can play an important role in ensuring governments apply them fairly, according to the executives
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trade-wars-could-spur-governments-embrace-web3-truebit?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Tether commits hash rate to OCEAN Mining, extending mining operations on Africa
data.description:
Tether announced on April 14 that it will begin deploying current and future Bitcoin (BTC) mining hashrate on OCEAN Mining as part of its African strategy. The decision marks a shift in the company’s operational mining infrastructure toward software that permits miners to construct block templates independently without reliance on centralized intermediaries.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/tether-commits-hash-rate-to-ocean-mining-extending-mining-operations-on-africa/

data.title: South Korea blocks 14 crypto exchanges on Apple Store — Report
data.description:
South Korea is expanding a ban on digital asset firms’ applications servicing its citizens. On April 11, the country’s Financial Services Commission (FSC) announced that 14 crypto exchanges were blocked on the Apple store. Among the affected exchanges are KuCoin and MEXC. The report, which was made public on April 14, says the banned exchanges were allegedly operating as unregistered overseas virtual asset operators
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/south-korea-blocked-14-crypto-exchange-apple-apps-report?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: KiloEX DEX hacked through oracle exploit, losses rise to $7M
data.description:
KiloEX, a perpetual futures DEX, showed unusual activity pointing to a possible hack. Investigators estimate an initial loss of over $6M. KiloEX, one of the emerging perpetual futures DEXs, was exploited, with losses reaching $6M based on initial estimations. Investigator Chaofan Shou first noticed the exploit. The estimation is that an attacker gained control of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kiloex-dex-hacked-through-oracle-exploit-losses-rise-to-7m/

data.description:

data.title: XRP Price Eyes $2.40 Breakout Amid Major Partnership Speculation
data.description:
Ripple (XRP) price rallied through a weekend rise from its $2. 00 critical support mark to reach $2. 23. SWIFT, a global financial messaging network made subtle hints it could introduce Ripple’s blockchain system which led to this market movement in XRP price
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/14/xrp-price-eyes-2-40-breakout-amid-major-partnership-speculation/

data.title: Cardano Could Drop To $0.54 If This Support Gives Out, Analyst Says
data.description:
An analyst has explained how Cardano is retesting the support line of a technical analysis (TA) pattern, losing which could spell a bearish outcome for the coin. Cardano Is Currently Trading Inside A Descending Channel In a new post on X, analyst Ali Martinez has talked about a pattern forming in the 3-day price of Cardano. The pattern in question is the Descending Channel from TA, which occurs when an asset observes consolidation toward a net downside between two parallel trendlines. The top line tracks successive lower highs in the price and the bottom one lower lows
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/cardano/cardano-drop-0-54-support-out-analyst-says/

data.title: Nayib Bukele Meets Donald Trump at White House, Discusses Bilateral Cooperation
data.description:
El Salvador's Nayib Bukele and Donald Trump meet at the White House, focusing on cooperation, immigration, and crime.
source: https://coincu.com/332169-bukele-trump-white-house-meeting
